# Live Product Tour: Mobile Push Messaging

Webinar

# Live Product Tour: Mobile Push Messaging

June 18, 2025

45 minutes

On demand

## Description

Check out our Live Product Tour as we walk through our mobile push capabilities, showcase Iterable embedded messaging, and how to leverage dynamic segmentation to track your target audiences in real-time.

**Learn how to:**

*   Use push notifications for time-sensitive campaigns like flash sales, abandoned cart reminders, and limited-time offers.
*   Go beyond basic messaging by using dynamic content and conditional logic to send highly relevant product recommendations and status updates.
*   Weave mobile push together with other channels like in-app messaging and catalog data to create a seamless, cohesive, and effective customer experience.
